title: Optimize sync path scans in PR sync
add-repo can leave/encounter held DB lock after team-exists error
description:
## Summary
`hive add-repo` reports a lock contention error immediately after a previous `add-repo` command returned a validation error (`Team already exists`).

## Environment
- CLI: `hive` (from local project build)
- Runtime: Node.js v20.20.0
- Error path in stack trace references: `/home/alast/Projects/hungry-ghost-hive/dist/...`

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Run:
   `hive add-repo --url https://github.com/aleeuwen/Grigora --team grigora-team`
2. Observe:
   `✖ Team "grigora-team" already exists`
3. Immediately run:
   `hive add-repo --url https://github.com/aleeuwen/Grigora --team grigora-team-2`

## Actual Behavior
Second command fails with lock error:
- `Failed to acquire database lock. Another process may be accessing the database.`
- Throws `ConcurrencyError` from `dist/db/lock.js`.

## Expected Behavior
After a handled validation error (`team already exists`), the next command should be able to acquire the DB lock normally (or retry and recover), not fail due to a stale/held lock.

## Notes
- No manual lock-file intervention attempted.
- This appears to be either lock leak on error path or lock lifetime overlap between invocations.

title: Add automated tests for stale reviewing PR recovery in manager
Add manager regression test for pr_submitted done-inference skip
Investigate remaining done=false false negatives in manager completion classifier
Investigate missing server/grpc proto files in active agent worktrees
Fix PR #231 failing title check
description: Update PR title to conventional commit format so required check-title passes.

title: Optimize cluster sync full-table scans
description: Cluster sync still performs full-table scans in scanLocalChanges/getDelta paths. Add incremental/index-aware scanning to reduce sync overhead at larger event volumes.
